pi_items.source: MedlinePlus, FDA, Cancer Research UK - confirmed as real cancer drug (Tagrisso) used for non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with EGFR mutations
MedlinePlus, Mayo Clinic, Wikipedia - confirmed as real beta-blocker medication used for hypertension, arrhythmias, and other cardiovascular conditions
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts - file is referenced in both setup and export hooks

privileged_info_summary: Osimertinib is a real cancer drug (brand name Tagrisso) used to treat non-small cell lung cancer. Propranolol is a real beta-blocker medication used for cardiovascular conditions. The task requires checking the drug-drug interaction between these two medications in the Liverpool Cancer iChart App. The app uses a traffic light color system with five colors: Red (Do Not Coadminister), Orange (Potential interaction requiring monitoring), Yellow (Potential weak interaction), Green (No clinically significant interaction), and Grey (No clear data available). Osimertinib is metabolized by CYP3A4/5 while Propranolol is metabolized by CYP2D6 and conjugation, suggesting no significant pharmacokinetic interaction between them.
